description_long: This stool features a round, flat seat with a smooth, light-colored surface, likely made of wood or a composite material. The seat is supported by four evenly spaced, slightly splayed black legs, providing stability and a modern aesthetic. Connecting the legs are two sets of horizontal crossbars, arranged in a square pattern, which serve as footrests and structural reinforcements. The crossbars are lighter in color, contrasting with the dark legs and complementing the seat. The overall design is simple and functional, with clean lines and no visible decorative embellishments. Its proportions and materials suggest it is suitable for use in public or urban environments such as cafes, parks, or waiting areas.
description: A round, light-colored stool with four black legs and light crossbars, featuring a simple, modern design. The stool is sturdy and functional, with no decorative elements.
description_view_0: The stool is seen from the front, showing the round seat, four black legs, and two sets of light crossbars forming a square.
description_view_1: This view highlights the left side of the stool, with the crossbars and leg arrangement clearly visible.
description_view_2: The back of the stool is visible, showing the same structural features and the symmetry of the crossbars.
description_view_3: The right side of the stool is shown, again emphasizing the crossbar structure and the splayed legs.
